checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong password policy for forum accounts
checklist_items.description: Check that the Governance Forum enforces a strong password policy (minimum length, complexity requirements, no common passwords) for users.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum relies on weak password-based authentication which can be easily guessed or brute-forced.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and enforce strong password policies, including complexity, length, and lockout mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot of password policy configuration in admin settings or results from manual testing of weak password creation.

checklist_items.title: Verify Governance Forum RFRV submitters link to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Verify that users submitting Request for Recognition and Vote (RFRV) on the Governance Forum are required to link their forum account to a verified on-chain identity (e.g., wallet address with delegation history) as part of the submission process.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no strong link between forum identity and on-chain identity.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Link forum accounts to verified on-chain identities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot of RFRV submission flow requiring linked on-chain identity, or documentation detailing the identity linking process.

checklist_items.title: Confirm wallet signature required for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Check if the process for submitting an RFRV on the Governance Forum requires the user to sign a transaction or message with their linked on-chain wallet to confirm their identity and intent for this critical action.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum currently relies on basic username/password authentication which is susceptible to spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require wallet signature for critical actions like RFRV submission.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or video showing the RFRV submission flow requires wallet signature confirmation.

checklist_items.title: Assess current Governance Forum authentication mechanism strength
checklist_items.description: Review the current authentication mechanism used by the Governance Forum for users who can submit RFRVs to identify existing vulnerabilities or weaknesses (e.g., weak password policy, lack of multi-factor authentication, susceptibility to credential stuffing attacks).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum currently relies on basic username/password authentication which is susceptible to spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication for RFRV submitters.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Report detailing current authentication mechanism configuration and identified weaknesses.

checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity or another strong identity mechanism linked to their on-chain persona.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration details of the authentication mechanism; walk-through showing identity verification process; audit log of RFRV submissions showing linked identity.

checklist_items.title: Verify on-chain identity linked for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Forum requires users submitting Request for Formal Verification (RFRV) posts to link and verify their forum account with an on-chain identity (e.g., a specific wallet address).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO) for users performing critical actions like submitting RFRVs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing successful RFRV submission requires a verified linked on-chain identity.

checklist_items.title: Verify on-chain identity linkage for RFRV submission accounts
checklist_items.description: Check if user accounts authorized to submit Request for Rationalized Voting (RFRV) proposals on the Governance Forum are securely linked to verified on-chain identities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of authentication flow, configuration settings, or observation of user registration/login process.

checklist_items.title: Check digital signature requirement for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Verify that RFRV proposals submitted via the Governance Forum require a valid digital signature from the linked on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require digital signatures for RFRV submissions originating from authorized identities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: API test result demonstrating signature verification failure, code review result of the submission endpoint.
